description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in casual attire, featuring a loose, short-sleeved plaid shirt worn open over a plain t-shirt. He wears baggy pants and classic lace-up sneakers, giving him a relaxed, everyday appearance suitable for urban environments. His head is covered with a bandana, and he has a short beard and mustache, adding to his rugged look. The figure's arms hang naturally at his sides, and his hands are relaxed and open. The clothing appears slightly oversized, contributing to a laid-back, approachable demeanor. The overall build is average, with realistic human proportions and a neutral, upright stance.
description: An adult male in casual, loose-fitting urban clothing with a plaid shirt, t-shirt, baggy pants, sneakers, and a bandana, standing upright.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open plaid shirt, t-shirt, facial features, and relaxed arm position.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, bandana, and the drape of the shirt and pants.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the bandana, shirt, and pants, with both arms visible from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, bandana, and the loose fit of the clothing.
attribute_clothing_type: casual open plaid shirt over t-shirt, loose pants, and classic sneakers with a bandana accessory
attribute_hairstyle: short hair covered by a bandana
